title: Tlactehon

A [[Merchant/Legends|trade]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] lying on the [[Corellian Run/Legends|Corellian Run]] [[Super-hyperroute/Legends|super-hyperroute]], '''Tlactehon''' was located in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region's]] [[Kailion sector/Legends|Kailion sector]]. A delegation from Tlactehon that was in reality a front for a gang of [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] once traveled to the planet [[Muunilinst/Legends|Muunilinst]], where it was scheduled to meet with representatives of the [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|InterGalactic Banking Clan]]. As part of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|conquest]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] by the [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|extragalactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]], the invaders held the [[Tlactehon system/Legends|Tlactehon system]] until at least [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]].

==Description==
Tlactehon was a [[Merchant/Legends|trade]] [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="GatORW">''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref> located in the [[Star system/Legends|star system]] of the [[Tlactehon system/Legends|same name]]. It was located in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region's]] [[Kailion sector/Legends|Kailion sector]],<ref name="EAOC" /> specifically in one of the [[Sector/Legends|subsectors]] constituting the [[77 Sectors]]. Tlactehon lay between the [[Allanteen system/Legends|Allanteen]] and [[Spirana system/Legends|Spirana systems]] on the [[Corellian Run/Legends|Corellian Run]] [[Super-hyperroute/Legends|super-hyperroute]], which served as a dividing line between the regions known as [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] and the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]].<ref name="TEA Tlactehon" />

==History==
At some point between [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] and [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]],<ref name="Date">According to ''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'', the delegation from Tlactehon traveled to [[Muunilinst/Legends|Muunilinst]] during the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|conflict]] against the "Empire." ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' places the [[Declaration of a New Republic/Legends|establishment]] of the New Republic in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] and the [[Pellaeon–Gavrisom Treaty|end]] of hostilities between the New Republic and the [[Imperial Remnant]], an incarnation of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] occasionally referred to as the "Empire" per ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]].</ref> a delegation from Tlactehon, in reality a front for a gang of [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] backed by members of the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Species/Legends|species]], traveled to the<ref name="GatORW" /> [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> planet [[Muunilinst/Legends|Muunilinst]]. The delegation was scheduled to prepare for a meeting with representatives of the [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|InterGalactic Banking Clan]] at [[High Port Space Center|High Port]], a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] in Muunilinst's [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]], but was delayed en route due to a mechanical fault of its [[Starship/Legends|starship]].<ref name="GatORW" />

{{RPGseed}}
Subsequently, another group of individuals that was similar in makeup to the Tlactehon delegation arrived first in the [[Muunilinst system/Legends|Muunilinst system]]. The unrelated group was mistaken for the Tlactehon delegation by agents of the [[New Republic Intelligence]] and the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]], who wanted the delegation's meeting with the Banking Clan to fail and succeed, respectively.<ref name="GatORW" />
{{Endgame}}

At some point between [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] and [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]], the military forces of the [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|extragalactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] species passed through the Tlactehon system during its [[Yuuzhan Vong War|conquest]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. The [[Star/Legends|star]] system was held under the control of those invaders until at least [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]].<ref name="TEA Tlactehon" />

==Behind the scenes==
Tlactehon was first mentioned in the [[2004]] [[Wizards of the Coast]] sourcebook ''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''. The book includes an adventure seed for use with the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'', and this article assumes the scenario plays out as described. In order for gamemasters to adapt the scenario for use in the [[Rebellion era]] setting, the book advises to substitute the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] agents interested in the Tlactehon delegation with agents of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].<ref name="GatORW" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Tlactehon system, and therefore Tlactehon itself, in grid square O-13.<ref name="TEA Tlactehon" />
